input.memoryNote: I once timed one of our kitchen conversations. It was 47 minutes about one email. One. We've done this three to four times a week for two years. I ran the math. We've spent over 300 hours in that kitchen. You are the only reason I have not quit this job. The math is extremely concerning but also the most important math of my life.

meta.tiktokHook: My work wife and I have spent 340 hours in the office kitchen complaining about the same 3 people. I calculated it. She is the only reason I'm still employed.
